title: Pistolochia alexeenkoana

intro: Pistolochia alexeenkoana, also known as Chinese Pistolochia, is a plant species belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its potential health benefits in reducing inflammation and improving immune function. The bioactive constituents of Pistolochia alexeenkoana include flavonoids, alkaloids, and triterpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
